content.rendered:
Privacy Policy

We are committed to protecting your workforce data. Learn how we collect, store, and secure your personal and biometric information.

Suggested Content Outline (Tailored to Attendo):

Security: Mention security measures like “Role-Based Access Control” and encrypted password storage.

Data Collection: Explicitly state you collect Personal Information (Name, Email, Salary), Location Data (for the “Geo-Location Binding” and “Anti-fake GPS” features), and Biometric Data (Fingerprint/Face ID for attendance sync).

Usage: Data is used solely for “Workforce Management,” “Attendance Tracking,” and “Payroll Processing”.
